name: CarGurus, Inc.
business: CarGurus is a multinational automotive platform that helps consumers and dealers confidently buy and sell vehicles. It derives revenue from dealer subscription fees, advertising from auto manufacturers and other brand advertisers, and partnerships with financing services companies.

exposures.sentence: Following the wind-down, we will continue to deliver AI-powered inventory intelligence through our insights platform and enable consumer vehicle sourcing at scale through Sell My Car, and will focus on technology and analytics that will enable smarter sourcing and pricing decisions rather than facilitating the transactions themselves.

We also derive revenue from partnerships with certain financing services companies pursuant to which we enable eligible consumers on our CarGurus U.S. website to pre-qualify for financing on cars from dealerships that offer financing through such companies.
